message:
feat(progress): Add progress bars and spinners for indexing (bd-1zb)

Add progress module for long-running operations with:
- ProgressIndicator with determinate (bar) and indeterminate (spinner) modes
- Auto-disable for non-TTY environments (piped output)
- ETA calculation and throughput tracking
- MultiProgressTracker for parallel operations
- IndexingProgress specialized helper with phase tracking

Also adds stdout_is_tty() and stderr_is_tty() methods to Output struct
for progress bar visibility control.

Uses indicatif crate with styled spinners and progress bars.
Includes 28 unit tests covering all functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
